variants.rewritten_question_text:

variants.title: SCEMQA 子题 1

A study was conducted to determine the effectiveness of varying amounts of vitamin C in reducing the number of common colds. A survey of 450 people provided the following information:

rationale: The gold answer is only recoverable as the numeric value 2, so the multiple-choice prompt is rewritten as a direct count question to match the available supervision without guessing a choice mapping.
